by the home 
health agency (HHA) while a patient is under a home health plan of care 
since the law requires consolidated billing of NPWT using a disposable 
device. 

Furnishing NPWT using a disposable device means the application of a new applicable 
disposable device, as that term is defined in §1834 of the Social Security Act (the Act), 
which includes only the device paid separately (specified by the assigned HCPCS code) 
and does not include payment for the professional services.
